title: 9 Teas for Ankylosing Spondylitis Symptoms in HLA-B27 Individuals
description: Curcuma longa teas, made from the turmeric plant, have been found to help alleviate symptoms of ankylosing spondylitis. This condition, a type of arthritis that affects the spine, causes pain, stiffness, and inflammation. Curcuma longa teas work by reducing inflammation and preventing the progression of the disease. The tea contains a powerful compound called curcumin, which has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Curcumin also has natural anti-arthritic and anti-pain ...
